---
title: "Metodologia aplicada a dados simulados"
author: "Doriedson"
date: "2024-12-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r Requisitos, include=FALSE}
require(dplyr)
require(lubridate)

source("abrev.R")

```

## Geração de dados

```{r echo=TRUE}


```
